motivation: Establish PPO performance baseline on 15-game Atari subset
comment: COMPLETE 45/45. Avg Q4=550. Wins 7/15 games vs PQN. Dominates: Phoenix (9x), Solaris (5.7x), NameThisGame (1.7x), MsPacman, DoubleDunk, Alien, PrivateEye. Fails: Enduro(0), MontezumaRevenge(0), Venture(0). Low: Breakout(1.4), Amidar(2.2).

motivation: Establish PQN performance baseline on 15-game Atari subset
comment: COMPLETE 45/45. Avg Q4=391. Wins 4/15 games vs PPO. Dominates: Amidar (14.5x), BattleZone (1.5x), SpaceInvaders (1.9x), Breakout (1.3x). Fails: Enduro(0), MontezumaRevenge(0), Venture(0). Low: DoubleDunk(-24), Phoenix(87).

motivation: Add LayerNorm to PPO NatureCNN — known plasticity intervention from CHAIN-SP paper
comment: COMPLETE 45/45 at 40M 3-seed. CATASTROPHIC: 3W/7L/5T. Phoenix 0.27x, Qbert 0.31x, Solaris 0.32x, SpaceInvaders 0.36x, PrivateEye 4.77x worse. Seed 1 results misleading — seeds 2/3 show collapse to 0 on many games. LayerNorm causes severe late-training instability.

motivation: Add Normalize-and-Project to PQN — complement existing LayerNorm, top plasticity method from Plasticine
comment: 10M pilot 15/15: BEST sample efficiency (12/15 >= 40M base at 10M). 40M 3-seed eval RUNNING. Pilot: 3W/3L/9T vs PQN base.

motivation: Full CHAIN-SP approach: LayerNorm + churn reduction loss for PPO
comment: 10M pilot 15/15: highest avg Q4(10M)=515. 40M 3-seed eval RUNNING. May share h003's late-training instability — WATCH CLOSELY.

motivation: DreamerV3-style symlog/symexp on value targets for scale-invariant learning
comment: COMPLETE 15/15 at 40M. 2W/1L/12T — NEUTRAL. Only MsPacman loss. No benefit over PPO baseline. Closed.

motivation: Post-update weight shrinkage + noise for plasticity maintenance (proven in on-policy RL)
comment: PILOT 14/15 (missing Enduro=always 0). 5W/1L/8T — BEST W/L RATIO. Solaris +78% (4054!), PrivateEye sign reversal, BattleZone +16%, Amidar 14x, Breakout 3x. Only MsPacman -17%. 3-seed eval RUNNING.

motivation: Add LSTM to PQN for memory-dependent games (Montezuma, Venture, etc.)
comment: 5/15 at 40M. 2W/0L/3T vs PQN. Phoenix 5.6x(!), Breakout 2.2x. Amidar/Qbert/Venture ties. 10 games still running.

motivation: Spectral norm on CNN layers constrains Lipschitz constant, prevents rank collapse

motivation: Anneal entropy coef from 0.03 to 0.001 — high early exploration, low late exploitation

motivation: Adaptive value function normalization for scale-invariant learning across games
comment: 11/15 at 40M. 1W/1L/9T — SAFE but minimal. Only Breakout win, MsPacman loss. No dramatic gains. Missing: Alien, BattleZone, NameThisGame, PrivateEye.

motivation: Random pruning 50% weights at init, static mask throughout training — ICML 2025 oral
comment: 10/15 at 40M. 4W/0L/6T — ZERO LOSSES! BattleZone +35%, PrivateEye improved, Amidar 14x, Breakout 2.2x. Missing: DoubleDunk, MsPacman, NameThisGame, Phoenix, Solaris (KEY games).
